mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, task_name, assignee_id, status, planned_start, planned_end, actual_start, actual_end, site_info FROM project_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CONFIRMED')
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET progress_pct = #{progressPct}, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 AND status IN ('COMPLETED', 'CONFIRMED')
SELECT id FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
